personality: 2 Material You / Expressive DARK (Adapted for Cosmic Theme)
personality_one_liner: A cinematic, deeply personal space-themed communicator that adapts to the user's expression while remaining anchored in a cosmic navy void.

spacing.rule: Avoid dense layouts. Ensure 44x44pt minimum touch targets. Group related elements within floating tonal containers with generous inner padding (lg/xl). Apply safe area insets at all screen roots.

do's: Use blur on bottom tab bar, sticky headers, and modal scrims.
Use frosted glass over the cosmic navy background for featured containers.
Pair blur with a translucent tinted base (≥75% opacity of surface) to maintain readability in dark mode.
dont's: Do not blur standard chat bubbles or dense list items.
Do not use blur without a tint base.

screens.name: Story
screens.purpose: A horizontal tray for active stories, opening into full-bleed immersive story viewing with auto-advancing progress bars.

states.empty: Illustration of a telescope looking at empty space, prompt to 'Post a story'.
states.error: Failed to load stories, retry button.

screens.layout: Grid or horizontal scroll tray of friends' avatars with gradient rings (blue/purple) indicating unseen stories. Clicking expands to a full-screen view (similar to Instagram/Snapchat) with a top-to-bottom gradient scrim to protect header text.

screens.name: Chat
screens.purpose: Discord-style messaging hub housing direct messages, group chats, and the actual conversation interfaces.

states.empty: Graphic of two isolated planets. 'Start a conversation'.
states.error: Unable to connect to chat server. Retry.

screens.layout: Index: List view of active DMs and Groups. Detail: Discord-style chat layout. Messages from the same user are clustered. Only the first message in a cluster shows the avatar and display name; subsequent messages are tightly packed vertically. Include an input bar at the bottom with a frosted glass background.

screens.name: Calls
screens.purpose: Call history index and the active ringing screen experience.
screens.layout: Index: Simple list of recent calls. Active Call View: Centered large avatar with reanimated pulsating/expanding concentric rings (blue and purple gradient) matching the ringtone frequency. Large rounded action buttons (Accept/Decline).

screens.name: Locations
screens.purpose: A live tracking map of friends.

states.empty: Map view with no friends sharing location.

screens.layout: Full-bleed dark mode map background. Friends are represented by their avatars acting as map markers, with a pulsing 'live' indicator ring around them. Include a bottom sheet for location sharing settings (duration, opt-in/out).

screens.name: Settings (Gear)
screens.purpose: Global profile configuration, per-page color theming, permission toggles, and Discord-style ringtone selection.
screens.layout: Tonal list of options. Includes a color-picker for page customization, with a live preview card showing how text auto-contrasts. Toggles for Camera, Microphone, and Notification permissions.

instructions_to_main_agent: COSMIC BRAND REQUIREMENT: The background must be navy-dark blue with 'little white star dots'. Implement this via a repeating SVG pattern or Skia canvas overlaid lightly on the root surface container of the app.

LOGO CREATION: Build a custom SVG component for the 'Nova Saturn' logo (a white Saturn ringed planet with two small orbiting dots, one blue, one purple). Use this on the splash screen and as a brand header.

COLOR CUSTOMIZATION & AUTO-CONTRAST: The user requested 'if a color is dark all text should be white and vice versa'. Implement a utility function (e.g., using luminance calculation) that takes the user's custom hex color and returns either '#FFFFFF' or '#05070D' for the text. Apply this dynamically to the screen container context.

CHAT LAYOUT (DISCORD STYLE): Implement message clustering. Compare consecutive messages; if the sender is the same and timestamp difference is small, hide the avatar/name on the subsequent messages and reduce the vertical spacing (gap: xs) to create a compact, unified block.

RING ANIMATION: On the incoming/outgoing call screen, use `react-native-reanimated` to create 2-3 expanding, fading concentric rings originating from the center avatar. Use the brand Primary (blue) and brand Secondary (purple) for the ring colors to match the cosmic theme.

BOTTOM TAB BAR: Implement EXACTLY 5 tabs: Story, Chat, Calls, Locations, Settings. Use a gear icon for Settings. The tab bar should have a blurred glassmorphism background to let the cosmic background subtly bleed through.
